candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not total; weaker than exact total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label.
Cash component, but not as complete/standard as the exact cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but target specifies balance sheet.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet cash total over cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.

candidates.why: Direct current financing debt line; best match for short-term debt and excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; also relevant, but likely overlaps with current interest-bearing debt total and would risk double counting.
Same semantic label but values are blank in preview; lower priority than populated lowercase variant.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean total current debt line and excluded lease liabilities. Did not add 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid double counting, since it likely rolls into current interest-bearing debt.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this exact balance-sheet tax payable/current tax liability label is a confident match.

candidates.why: Reported balance-sheet total tangible asset line; best proxy for PPE under IFRS in this shipping company.
Only a component of tangible assets, not the total.
Net tangible asset component, substantial but narrower than the broader total tangible assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the broad reported tangible asset total as the best PPE equivalent; excluded right-of-use assets per baseline PPE preference.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow provided by operating activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.
Header/section label rather than the reported net cash flow total.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow provided by operating activities
